overview.summary: Graphify Structure Layer (GRAPH_LAYER) preserves Graphify as preprocessed top nodes, communities and entry points with performancePolicy=NO_FULL_GRAPH_LOAD.

principles.name: NO_FULL_GRAPH_LOAD
principles.rationale: Graphify is imported as preprocessed top nodes, communities and entry points.

principles.name: Focus Mode dependency inspection
principles.description: Use Focus Mode (F) on any SDU artifact to inspect dependency tree.

decisions.title: Graphify Structure Layer
decisions.context: Graphify is imported as preprocessed top nodes, communities and entry points.
decisions.decision: Use Graphify sourceViews=["C:\\CEO\\watchdog\\graphify-out\\views\\watchdog.json","C:\\CEO\\watchdog\\graphify-out\\views\\noc.json","C:\\CEO\\watchdog\\graphify-out\\views\\commands.json","C:\\CEO\\watchdog\\graphify-out\\views\\runtime.json"] and structureIndex=../graphify-structure.json without full graph load.
decisions.rationale: Use Focus Mode (F) on any SDU artifact to inspect dependency tree.

implementationNotes: Original SDU field name: "Graphify Structure Layer"
Original SDU field context: "Graphify is imported as preprocessed top nodes, communities and entry points."
Original SDU field possibleAction: "Use Focus Mode (F) on any SDU artifact to inspect dependency tree."
